name: PATRA
desc: An open-source digital card generator for students and professionals. Easily create and share personalized digital cards with a unique public ID.

name: 4D_VECTOR_CLI
desc: A versatile CLI tool for translation, summarization, and code snippet generation using Bash, Python, and OpenAI APIs.

name: Forex Historical Exchange Data REST API
desc: A RESTful API that scrapes and serves historical forex data from Yahoo Finance, storing it in an in-memory SQLite database.

name: Spam Mail Detection
desc: A machine learning model using Logistic Regression to classify and detect spam emails.

name: Reconciler Using DOM
desc: A plain JavaScript implementation of a reconciliation algorithm, demonstrated through a dynamic Todo List that manually calculates diffs and updates the DOM.
